title: Getting Started with Express.js
author: Mustafa
content: Express.js is a fast, minimalist web framework for Node.js. It simplifies routing, middleware handling, and server-side development.

title: Understanding REST APIs
author: Aisha
content: REST APIs allow clients and servers to communicate using standard HTTP methods such as GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, and DELETE.

title: Why Learn EJS?
author: Rahul
content: EJS lets you embed JavaScript directly into HTML templates, making it easy to render dynamic content on the server.

title: Bootstrap for Beginners
author: Sarah
content: Bootstrap provides a responsive grid system and pre-built components that help developers build beautiful interfaces quickly.

title: Node.js Event Loop Explained
author: David
content: The event loop enables Node.js to perform non-blocking I/O operations efficiently by handling asynchronous callbacks.

title: Introduction to Middleware
author: Emily
content: Middleware functions execute during the request-response cycle and can modify requests, responses, or end the cycle.

title: CRUD operations for backend !
author: mustafa
content: CRUD -----> Create, Read, Update, Delete this are main or basic building blocks for CRUD operations to design REST APIs

title: Understanding HTTP Status Codes
author: John
content: HTTP status codes like 200, 201, 404, and 500 communicate the outcome of a request between client and server.

title: What is Server-Side Rendering?
author: Sophia
content: Server-side rendering generates HTML on the server before sending it to the browser, improving SEO and initial page load.

title: NEET UG experience
author: faiza
content: NEET UG is a competitive exam in India, conducted by NTA (national test agency) designed for entrance test for medical aspiring students

title: MCA - reality
author: safah khan
content: MCA (Masters of computer application) , I'm pursuing it from Dr. B.R Ambetkar marathwada university Aurangabad , MH here faculty is very supportive , more technical subjects and structured schedule
